h1.visual_description: Large, centered, serif font with generous vertical spacing; used for major section titles.
h1.example_text: Observations from the Spitzer Space Telescope (SST).

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption identifier, typically rendered in bold at the start of a caption block.
Internal hyperlink for cross-referencing figures or sections.

visual_matchers.pattern: small centered text directly beneath images
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Sub-image labels or individual captions within a multi-part figure.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: not observed; default to standard LaTeX $...$ for inline and $$...$$ for block
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Internal hyperlinked text (e.g., Figure 2) pointing to document elements.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text containing page number and chapter/section metadata separated by a pipe (e.g., '336 | Chapter 6 Section 6.5: ...').
